name: softwareupdate
description: Software Update checks for new and updated versions of your software based on information about your computer and current software

options.description: Automatically restart (or shut down) if required to complete installation

subcommands.name: --fetch-full-installer
subcommands.description: Install the latest recommended macOS Installer

subcommands.name: --full-installer-version
subcommands.description: The version of macOS to install

subcommands.name: --background
subcommands.description: Trigger a background scan and update operation

subcommands.name: --dump-state
subcommands.description: Log the internal state of the SU daemon to /var/log/install.log

subcommands.name: --evaluate-products
subcommands.description: Evaluate a list of product keys specified by the --products option

subcommands.name: --history
subcommands.description: Show the install history.  By default, only displays updates installed by softwareupdate

options.description: Include all processes in history (including App installs)
Do not scan when listing or installing updates (use available updates previously scanned)
Limit a scan to a particular product type only - ignoring all others
A comma-separated (no spaces) list of product keys to operate on
Force an operation to complete.  Use with --background to trigger a background scan regardless of "Automatically check" pref
Agree to the software license agreement without user interaction
